creator: dru@FreeBSD.org
text: If a program listing is more than 9 lines long, the line numbers cycle back to 0-9. For example, the first program listing in http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/network-iscsi.html is 15 lines long, but the lines are numbered from 1-9, then from 0-5.
